headline: Booking Holdings Inc. (BKNG) Strengthens Balance Sheet as Q1 Results Impress
summary: Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:BKNG) is one of the top stocks to buy for the long-term. On May 8, Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:BKNG) completed the sale of $750 million of 5.375% Senior Notes. The notes are to mature in May 2036 unless redeemed or repurchased earlier. Earlier on April 29, Cantor Fitzgerald reiterated a Neutral rating […]
